Fun Links

Links relating to hobbies, games, toys, and other fun stuff!

Links marked with a "⭐" are personal favorites of mine.

Table of Contents
  • Gaming
  • Browser Games
  • Art
  • Miscellaneous

Browser Games

Games that you can play right in your browser!

  • Cookie Clicker
    • Cookie Clicker Wiki - Trust me, you'll need it.
  • Coolmath Games
  • Flight Rising - Breed, battle, and raise your own dragons!
  • Neal.fun - Home of Infinite Craft, The Password Game, and more! Personally, I'm a big fan of Internet Artifacts.
  • New Club Penguin - Fan-made Club Penguin revival.
  • Otter Spice
  • Toontown Rewritten - Fan-made Toontown Online revival.
    • Toontown Preservation Project
  • Transylmania Deluxe

Hobbies

Gaming

Resources related to (non-browser) video games.

  • 3D Chao Viewer
  • DarkPattern.games - Mobile game review site that reports games with dark patterns so you can avoid them.
  • Hacks.guide - Includes guides for how to homebrew/mod 3DS, Wii U, PS Vita, Wii, and Nintendo Switch systems.
  • The VG Resource - Video Game Assets
    • The Spriters Resource
    • The Models Resource
    • The Textures Resource
    • The Sounds Resource

Art

Tools for making art.

  • Animal Photo Art References Search
  • Color Palettes
    • Colourpod
    • Coolors
  • Height Comparison Tool
  • LibreSprite - Free and open source sprite/pixel art program.
  • Quickposes
  • Reference Angle - Tool for finding reference images of human faces.
  • Shake Art Deluxe

Miscellaneous

Other fun stuff that I don't know how to categorize.

  • Inclusive Picrew Directory - Directory of dress-up games/character creators that include often underrepresented traits (diverse skin tones, religious wear, disability aids, etc).
  • Incredibox
  • MyRetroTVs
  • The Useless Web
  • Toms Toys
  • Video Game Text Box Generator
